body:
# Components

## AI Guard

* :sparkles: Copy anomaly detection tags to AI Guard spans (#11319 - @smola)
* :sparkles: Collect client IP tags for AI Guard requests (#11233 - @smola)

## Application Security Management (WAF)

* :sparkles: Collect Datadog security-testing headers on HTTP server entry spans (#11418 - @christophe-papazian)
* :sparkles: Add server.request.body.filenames and files_content for GlassFish/Payara (#11267 - @jandro996)

## Configuration at Runtime

* :bug: Request feature flag config on the first RC poll (#11465 - @leoromanovsky)

## Continuous Integration Visibility

* :sparkles: Propagate Jenkins custom parent ID (#11348 - @juan-fernandez)
* :sparkles: Update JUnit4 instrumentation to fire test suite events for Bazel (#11322 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Propagate test skipping enabled tag to CI Visibility test spans (#11300 - @anmarchenko)
* :sparkles: Use test_srcdir as virtual repo root for bazel runs (#11273 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :bug: Consider Gradle wrapper as a wrapper for headless calculations (#11266 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Report bazel as provider in telemetry for payload-in-files mode (#11207 - @daniel-mohedano)

## Crash Tracking

* :sparkles: Redacted registry memory mapping in crash tracking (#11025 - @bric3)

## Database Monitoring

* :sparkles: Add a new dynamic_service DBM propagation mode (#11432 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles: Improve DBM commenter (#11339 - @amarziali)

## Dynamic Instrumentation

* :sparkles: debugger/symdb: add upload metadata fields to upload event message (#11329 - @andreimatei)

## ML Observability (LLMObs)

* :bug: emit session_id as top-level field + propagate via context (#11371 - @jessicagamio)

## Metrics

* :sparkles::zap: Update client-side stats to use light weight Hashtable (#11382 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Defer MetricKey construction to the aggregator thread (#11381 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Use bitmask SpanKindFilter for per-span eligibility in metrics aggregator (#11380 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles:  Support OTLP runtime metrics with OTel-native naming (#11318 - @link04)
* :sparkles: Allow ignoring the agent version when checking for trace stats computation support (#11064 - @bric3)

## OpenFeature

* :bug: Recover OpenFeature provider after initialization timeout (#11474 - @leoromanovsky)
* :bug: Request feature flag config on the first RC poll (#11465 - @leoromanovsky)
* :bug: use delta temporality for OTLP metrics export (#11426 - @sameerank)
* :bug: read OTEL_SERVICE_NAME for metrics resource (#11424 - @sameerank)

## Profiling

* :bug: Bump java-profiler to 1.44.0 for more critical stability fixes (#11501 - @jbachorik)
  * :bug: Bump java-profiler to 1.43.0 for critical stability fixes (#11475 - @jbachorik)
* :sparkles: Enable publishing process context by default (#11288 - @ivoanjo)

## Telemetry

* :sparkles: Add Telemetry for Extension Finder SPIs (#11298 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles: Introduce OTel SPI Metrics (#11297 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles: Update Baggage Metrics for Extract (#11278 - @mhlidd)

## Testing

* :sparkles: 🪞 9979 - Record detailed instrumentation errors during tests (#10300 - @deejgregor - thanks for the contribution!)

## Trace context propagation

* :sparkles: Add lazy-transformer to KeyClassifier for deferred header decoding (#11466 - @amarziali)

## Tracer core

* :sparkles::zap: Cache hashCode on UTF8BytesString (#11444 - @dougqh)
* :bug: Fix DDSpan.addThrowable crashing when exception getMessage() throws (#11428 - @ValentinZakharov)
* :bug: Avoid extracting the baggage from null values (#11396 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles::zap: Update client-side stats to use light weight Hashtable (#11382 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Defer MetricKey construction to the aggregator thread (#11381 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Use bitmask SpanKindFilter for per-span eligibility in metrics aggregator (#11380 - @dougqh)
* :bug: Fix bugs in GenerationalUtf8Cache constructor and access-time handling (#11323 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Remove deprecated internal spanBuilder methods (#11287 - @amarziali)
* :bug: Fix peer IP tag in Play 2.3/2.4/2.5 (#11274 - @smola)
* :sparkles: Move network.client.ip out of AppSec into HttpServerDecorator (#11208 - @smola)

# Instrumentations

## AWS Lambda instrumentation

* :sparkles: force placeholder resource so the Lambda Extension drops dd-tracer-serverless-span (#11313 - @zarirhamza)

## AWS SDK instrumentation

* :bug::zap: Skip ClassCastException on every DynamoDB request in AWS SDK v2 instrumentation (#11285 - @dougqh)

## Eclipse Vert.x instrumentation

* :bug: finish vertx.route-handler via RoutingContext.addEndHandler fallback (#11312 - @zarirhamza)

## gRPC instrumentation

* :sparkles::zap: Avoid Metadata.key allocations on grpc (#11351 - @amarziali)

## JDBC instrumentation

* :sparkles: Mute telemetry when Connection.getClientInfo fails (#11412 - @amarziali)

## JMS instrumentation

* :sparkles: Have a fully JMS 1.0 compatible instrumentation (#11413 - @amarziali)

## OpenTelemetry instrumentation

* :sparkles::zap: Use FAST_LANE prioritization for OTLP trace export (#11447 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles: Add Additional OTel JVM Runtime Metrics and Gate "Developmental" Metrics (#11411 - @mhlidd)
* :bug: Fix the behaviour of asynchronous counters and up-down counters (#11332 - @mcculls)
* :bug: Avoid potential shutdown delay when using GRPC protocol for OTLP (#11321 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles:  Support OTLP runtime metrics with OTel-native naming (#11318 - @link04)
* :bug: Fix OtelLogRecordProcessor schedule (#11315 - @mcculls)
* :bulb::zap: Reduce allocation rate when marshaling OTLP data (#11296 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles: Enable publishing process context by default (#11288 - @ivoanjo)

## Play Framework instrumentation

* :bug: Fix peer IP tag in Play 2.3/2.4/2.5 (#11274 - @smola)

## Reactor instrumentation

* :sparkles::zap: avoid attaching context if it's already attached (#11393 - @amarziali)

## Servlet instrumentation

* :bug: Tolerate AbstractMethodError for servletRequest remote port (#11403 - @amarziali)
* :bug: avoid NPE when headerNames is null (#11394 - @amarziali)

## All other instrumentations

* :broom: Remove deprecated startSpan and use integration name for telemetry (#11181 - @amarziali)
